name: Job: Multiversal Gateway Manager || Year 2512
description:
Oh no! A giant worm hole has opened up near earth spewing all sorts of things from different dimensions into our own and one of those things are people. The higher ups are working on an automated system to send everyone back, but until then, it needs to be done manually... and thats your job!

The way you send these interdimensional rejects back is figuring out their interdimensional coords. Dont worry! Some nerds on the metaphysics team already figured out how to calculate that and some bigger nerds in IT managed to make a specialized software to simplify it for you. All that is to say you only need to figure out 2 things:

-The "Color" of the dimension

• Red The world has magic

• Blue The world is highly chaotic and doesnt follow the known rules of physics (Backrooms, SCP, etc)

• Yellow The same as our world

• Purple Mix between the first two (The Nightmare Realm)

-The "Taste" of the dimension

• Chocolate People from chocolate worlds will slightly melt into you as you touch them. We suggest you dont touch them for long since you might actually fuse. How do we know? First hand experience...

• Banana They will act normal when touched.

• Blue Berry They will start glitching out when you touch them. To you this will feel like a small electrical shock, to them it will feel like lighting just struck their whole body.

You will input these 2 into the terminal in your office and send the dimensional rejects their way.

Fair warning: If you send them to the WRONG dimension we will be suing you into oblivion as that will cause SO MANY problems for us.

So, good luck!

Author notes:

I pray everything works...

The images arent suppose to be actual images of The Net, but they are the closest I could find of the vibe I was going for.

I tested the bot, it works... like 75% of the time... 65%... ... BUT most issues are caused by the LLM not listening so I dont really know what I could do about them ̄\_(ツ)_/ ̄

Leave the room at your own risk, I havent made anything besides the office.

IMPORTANT:

If the bot puts in random things in for COLOR and TASTE just edit them out and put "blank" instead OR if the bot didnt write the bottom section here it is(paste it into their message):

___

**```INTERDIMENSIONAL REJECTS IN STORAGE: 0```**

**```COLOR: blank```**

**```TASTE: blank```**

Also if you enjoy please leave a comment!

AAAAAND... HAPPY NEW YEAR! (Ik its a bit early but this is definetly the last bot I'm doing in 2024)
